meta.title: The right fighter for Ukraine isn't the F-16, it's the GRIPEN
meta.description:
If a nation is going to provide Ukraine with fighters, the best option would be Sweden's JAS 39 Gripen C, thanks to its low operating cost, ease of maintenance, and high levels of capability... but there is one problem with this idea. 

#short #shorts #gripen #saab #fighterjet #ukraine #airpower #fighterjet
